title: AEP v1.1 F17 Packet History DAG Event
description: v1.1 F17 frontier-break primitive (SPECULATIVE FRONTIER). Three-agent convergence (warden+scribe+curator). aepkg.json.extensions.packet_history[] is an append-only typed list of (audit | amendment | promotion | rollback) events forming a DAG (not just a chain). Supports sec41 DAG re-anchor natively. Composes_with: sec41 HCRL, sec73.5 warden-receipts-or-halt, v0.8 F2 reproducibility_certificate, v1.0.3.1 F14 RaterQuorumAttestation (audits carry rater quora).

event_kind.description: Typed event kind. supersede + contradict come from scribe-IDEA-2; promotion + audit + amendment + rollback are core warden+curator; freeze_lock + redaction inherited from v0.8.

auditor_principal_id.description: Principal that emitted this event (role + did:key).

parent_event_ids.description: Parent event IDs. Empty array = root event. Multiple parents = DAG merge (forms the DAG topology). Single parent = linear chain segment.

verdict.description: Event verdict. Composes with v1.0.3.1 F14 verdict taxonomy.

event_signature_ed25519.description:
Ed25519 signature over (id || '
' || event_kind || '
' || event_at || '
' || auditor_principal_id || '
' || JCS-canonical-encode(parent_event_ids) || '
' || verdict). Base64url-encoded.

bound_to_packet_id.description: The packet this event modifies. Cross-packet events (e.g., supersede) reference the SOURCE packet here.

bound_to_packet_sha256_pre.description: Packet sha256 BEFORE this event. Anchors the event to a concrete packet state.

bound_to_packet_sha256_post.description: Packet sha256 AFTER this event. null if event is informational (audit) and does not change packet.

evidence_artifact_sha256.description: Optional. sha256 of the evidence artifact (e.g., audit report, amendment diff, promotion gate output).

rater_quorum_id.description: Optional. F14 RaterQuorumAttestation id if this event was rater-attested. Required for promotion events under v1.0.3.1 strict profile.

narrative_summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the event.

composes_with_doctrine_slots.description: Doctrine slot IDs this event composes with (e.g., sec41 for DAG re-anchor).

examples.narrative_summary: Judge audit of v1.0.3 unified forge output (HCRL row 6).
